Download Reference : The data presented in these graphics were shared during an ACIP presentation from June 2025 , which shared information on COVID-19 hospitalizations in children from July 2024-May 2025. 
Sample messages 
Message 1 (English) 
Parents: Your child's health is your top priority, and their doctor shares the same commitment. Talk to your child's doctor if you have questions about vaccine recommendations for respiratory viruses like COVID-19. Learn more about the best ways to protect your child from respiratory illnesses at https://bit.ly/4lX4jtN
